title: Refined Animals
description: Remodels classic animals to fit-in of Minecraft's modern artstyle!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2cda7d5135df786763533d2310676e877090a48.png)
**Remodels classic animals to fit-in of Minecraft's modern artstyle!**

# **[​Optifine, Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features are required]**

**WARNING!!!**

**This pack does not work in version 1.21.5!
I'll make some variants soon maybe...**
